title: lessingia germanorum subsp. euglandulifera
intro: Lessingia germanorum subsp. euglandulifera, also known as German's lessingia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of German's lessingia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain health conditions, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
